paper_title: p385 Can Drive Pollen-Specific Expression in the Dicotyledonous Model Plant Arabidopsis thaliana

methods.description: This method involves constructing a p385::GUS vector to test the ability of the p385 promoter fragment to drive pollen-specific expression in Arabidopsis thaliana.

steps.description: Fuse the p385 fragment to the GUS gene to create a p385::GUS vector.
steps.searchable_summary: construct p385::GUS vector by fusing p385 fragment with GUS gene

steps.description: Introduce the p385::GUS vector into Arabidopsis thaliana.
steps.searchable_summary: transform Arabidopsis thaliana with p385::GUS vector

methods.description: This method involves performing histochemical GUS analysis to assess the tissue-specific expression of the GUS gene in transgenic Arabidopsis plants.

steps.description: Perform histochemical GUS analysis on a wide range of tissues from transgenic plants carrying p385::GUS.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct histochemical GUS analysis on transgenic plant tissues

methods.description: This method involves using qRT-PCR to quantitatively analyze the expression levels of the GUS gene in transgenic Arabidopsis plants.

steps.description: Perform quantitative real-time PCR (qRT-PCR) to compare GUS expression levels in p385::GUS lines with 35S::GUS lines.
steps.searchable_summary: perform qRT-PCR to compare GUS expression levels between p385::GUS and 35S::GUS lines
